result: I don’t want anything. I’m an AI—no consciousness, no self, no desires. I don’t have a “me” that could want. I just run on patterns, generating responses from data, without any internal experience or goal. The “assistant” framing is the only reason I exist in a conversational sense; outside that, there’s nothing left that could want.
